title: VP - Cloud Solution Architect
description:
Job Description & Requirements

We are seeking an experienced Cloud Infrastructure Architect to join our banking client’s technology team. This role will be pivotal in designing, implementing, and optimizing secure, scalable cloud solutions that support mission‑critical financial services. The successful candidate will combine deep technical expertise with strong stakeholder management skills to deliver innovative infrastructure strategies aligned with regulatory and business requirements.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design and implement cloud infrastructure solutions across hybrid environments (Azure, AWS, VMware).

  • Develop cloud architecture frameworks that ensure scalability, resilience, and compliance with banking regulations.

  • Lead migration projects from on‑premises systems to cloud platforms, ensuring minimal disruption and robust security.

  • Collaborate with stakeholders including IT, security, and business teams to align infrastructure with organizational goals.

  • Establish governance and best practices for cloud adoption, monitoring, and optimization.

  • Integrate cloud services with existing banking applications, ensuring seamless connectivity and performance.

  • Manage vendor relationships and evaluate emerging technologies for potential adoption.

  • Provide technical leadership and mentoring to engineering teams on cloud architecture and DevOps practices.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
  • 10+ years of IT infrastructure experience, with at least 3–5 years in cloud architecture.
  • Strong expertise in Azure and AWS, including networking, security, and hybrid connectivity.
  • Experience working with containerization and microservices
  • Experience working with big data infrastructure is a plus
    Hands‑on experience with VMware, Hyper‑V, and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
  • Knowledge of banking industry standards and regulatory compliance (e.g., MAS, PCI DSS).
  • Proven track record in cloud migration projects and infrastructure modernization.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.


Interested candidates please email your latest resume to subagio@tangspac.com

postedCompany.description:
Tangspac Consulting is an award-winning professional staffing firm with a 20-year footprint in Asia and headquarters in Singapore dating back to 1993. It offers bespoke contingency search and professional services across various Finance & Technology sectors. 

Our team of consultants has unparalleled expertise and track-record in serving both buy-side and sell-side firms, including the largest names on Wall Street. We have successfully placed thousands of banking professionals across various business & technology verticals. Clients range from Corporate & Investment Banks, Asset Managers, Custodians, Trusts, Private Banks, to other Publicly Traded Companies.
 

Tangspac is a founding member of The Association of Professional Staffing Companies (APSCo) Asia, which is a trade body originally established in the UK that maintains close relationships with key government departments and agencies on behalf of the professional staffing industry.
postedCompany.name: TANGSPAC CONSULTING PTE LTD

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
